name: @kolmogorov/quantize-worker
description: Isolated kolm quantization worker. Heavy ML deps (bitsandbytes/auto-gptq/optimum/torch/accelerate) live HERE, not in the root package. Root kolm install stays light; tenants opt in to the worker when they have the toolchain.

python.note: Install in a separate Python venv. The Node entrypoint detects whether `python3` + `torch` + `bitsandbytes` are importable and only invokes scripts/quantize.py when all three succeed; otherwise it stops with an honest manifest naming what is missing.
